overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck simulator game showing a semi-truck cab maneuvering through a container terminal. The camera follows in third-person view as the truck drives between rows of parked shipping containers and trailers under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open container terminal yard with gantry cranes

events.description: truck begins moving forward from stationary position into the container yard

agents.ego_description: starting the engine and beginning to maneuver the semi-truck forward through the open yard

entered.detail: industrial building with yellow facade and company signage
large blue container crane structure with metal framework
large blue container crane structure with metal framework
rows of parked white shipping container trailers with company logos
marked asphalt surface with parking lines and container slots

segments.scene_description: The truck starts in an open container terminal yard with a yellow freight building on the left and large gantry cranes visible in the distance. The truck begins moving forward toward the rows of parked container trailers under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow lane between parked container trailers

events.description: truck enters the confined corridor between rows of parked container trailers

agents.ego_description: carefully driving the truck forward through the narrow passage between parked trailers

entered.detail: row of white shipping container trailers with colorful logos parked immediately to the left
row of white shipping container trailers parked immediately to the right
narrow asphalt lane between the trailer rows with parking markings

segments.scene_description: The truck moves into a narrow corridor between tightly parked container trailers on both sides. The yellow terminal building and gantry cranes recede into the background as the truck navigates the confined asphalt lane through the container storage area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a semi-truck transitions from an expansive terminal yard into a confined corridor of shipping containers. It begins in an open area with a yellow freight building to the left and towering gantry cranes visible against a partly cloudy sky. As the truck moves forward, the wide horizon narrows and the distant industrial structures recede into the background. The scene then shifts into a tight asphalt lane, where the open space is replaced by rows of closely parked container trailers flanking the vehicle on both sides.
